text: The world tilts around me, glass and steel reflecting my own uncertainty. I am at the threshold of anticipation—spaces of learning and creation stretch invitingly ahead, yet it feels as though I am an outsider, peering through transparent barriers. Serenity mingles with a quiet tension, as if I am waiting for something significant to unfold. There is an almost sterile promise in the air, a sense that within these rooms, ideas are incubating, ready to emerge.
